mapper.sql: ( (#{semester} IS NULL AND sm.is_current = 1) OR ( #{semester} IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester} ) )
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, c.credits AS credit, ( SELECT LISTAGG( CASE ss.day_of_week WHEN 'MON' THEN '월' WHEN 'TUE' THEN '화' WHEN 'WED' THEN '수' WHEN 'THU' THEN '목' WHEN 'FRI' THEN '금' WHEN 'SAT' THEN '토' ELSE ss.day_of_week END || ' ' || ss.start_time || '-' || ss.end_time, ', ' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.start_time, ss.day_of_week) FROM section_schedule ss WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS schedule, ( SELECT LISTAGG(room_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY room_name) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room_name FROM section_schedule ss JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) ) AS room, cs.capacity, COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM enrollment e JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' ) AS avg_satisfaction FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(c.course_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(c.course_code) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) ORDER BY c.course_name, cs.section_no

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.section_id) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_courses, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cs.enrolled_count), 0) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS total_students, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = cs.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ) AS avg_satisfaction FROM dual
